agentHints.purpose: A restaurant-themed snake game with a deliberate wrap-around edge mechanic.
agentHints.wrapRule: Do not remove edge wrapping. A snake that exits left appears on the right; the same applies to all four edges.
agentHints.foodRule: Food uses emoji because it remains crisp at every canvas size. Replace label, emoji, and points together.
agentHints.goalRule: The run is a win only when score reaches or exceeds gameplay.scoreTarget. Keep the visible score formatted as current/target.
agentHints.cssRule: Values in css are exposed directly as CSS custom properties. Canvas colours read the same properties from JavaScript.

content.title: Vapiano Loop
content.intro: Snack your way around the kitchen. Slide off any edge and reappear on the other side.
content.overMessage: You plated {score} of {target} points. Avoid your own pasta trail next round.
content.winMessage: You plated {score} points and hit the {target}-point goal.
